nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Project README describing JokTec as a modular NestJS microservice framework with apps and reusable packages.

layers.name: Common Core
layers.description: Framework bootstrap, abstractions, config, logging, metrics, transports, exceptions, and runtime infrastructure.

layers.name: Common Support
layers.description: Shared cron, utility, and type/schema packages.

layers.name: Adapters
layers.description: Cache, mailer, notifier, and storage adapter packages.

layers.name: Brokers
layers.description: Kafka, RabbitMQ, Redcast, and SQS messaging packages.

layers.name: Databases
layers.description: Mongo, MySQL, Arango, BigQuery, and Elastic packages.

layers.name: Workspace Configuration
layers.description: Root workspace, TypeScript, lockfile, Nx/Lerna, and package config files.

tour.title: Start with agent docs and README
tour.description: Read AGENTS.md, PROJECT_CONTEXT, ARCHITECTURE, RUNTIME, and README to understand the stable framework shape.

tour.title: Understand runtime bootstrap
tour.description: Follow Application.bootstrap into GatewayFactory and MicroFactory.

tour.title: Learn core abstractions
tour.description: Review BaseController, BaseService, ClientController, ClientService, and AbstractClientService.

tour.title: Trace app composition
tour.description: Read example app modules, repository modules, and feature modules.

tour.title: Explore messaging and scheduled work
tour.description: Inspect broker loaders/decorators and cron/job packages.

metadata.source: understand-anything deterministic scan plus repository docs
